Note: A maximum of 62 lower level credits can apply to the 120 total credits required for a degree. If you complete more than 58 upper level credits you can complete fewer lower level credits to reach 120 total credits. If you exceed 62 lower level credits, you will exceed 120 total credits in order to complete the degree.
